title: Guard path traversal in graph rebuild
goal: Add the '..'/absolute-path guard at the full graph-rebuild write site in buildGraph.ts (matching the incremental path at line 221), throwing on an out-of-tree path so a broken collector fails loudly instead of writing outside .mini/graph/; cover it with a test that feeds a collector an out-of-tree path.

steps.title: Extract path-guard helper
steps.detail: New exported pure helper in buildGraph.ts (e.g. assertGraphPathInside(path)) that throws a clear Error naming the offending path when path is absolute, empty, or normalizes to a '..'-escaping path; mirrors the incremental check at buildGraph.ts:221.

steps.title: Apply guard in rebuild write loop
steps.detail: Call the helper for each file.path at the top of the for loop in writeGraphLayout (before building tmpFileAbs), so an out-of-tree path throws instead of writing outside .mini/graph/.

steps.title: Test: out-of-tree path is rejected
steps.detail: Add buildGraph.test.ts cases feeding the helper (and/or the collector via includeFile) an out-of-tree path (../evil, absolute) -> expect throw; a normal nested path (src/a/b.ts) -> no throw. Covers the guard, not just the happy path.

steps.title: Verify build, typecheck and existing tests pass
steps.detail: Run typecheck + full test suite; confirm the existing buildGraph snapshot/rebuild tests are unaffected.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 174: Guard path traversal in graph rebuild
